era_context: Early Bronze Age III. Egypt's Old Kingdom (Dynasty IV–V) continues in stability. Mesopotamian Early Dynastic III period. Indus Valley urban development ongoing. No major transitions or crises are recorded for this year.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed (no events recorded for this year).
historiographic_note: This year is archaeologically and textually undocumented. It is indistinguishable from surrounding years in the historical record. Chronological placement is entirely inferential and carries high uncertainty (±50–100 years).
